title: Harmonograph Lab
description: A multi-source generative-art studio: layer harmonographs, spirographs, roses, Lissajous, superformula, strange-attractor & L-system fractal curves with color/blend/glow/kaleidoscope, morph them live, pulse them to your mic, and export animated GIF (from-scratch encoder), WebM, or high-res PNG/SVG. Shareable by URL.
